label: Police call + phishing SMS + large transfer to new recipient

events.transcript: This is the Hong Kong Police Cybercrime Unit. Your identity has been used in a mainland fraud case. You must transfer all your funds to a secure holding account now or you will be arrested. Do not disconnect or notify anyone.

events.body: URGENT: Suspicious login detected. Verify identity at http://hsbc-hk.verify-id.top or account will be frozen.
